title: Stage Execution Contract
description: Schema for each stage's execution contract. Defines how a stage should be executed, its inputs, outputs, and completion conditions.

has_waiting_state.description: Whether this stage enters waiting_for_user after initial execution

required_skill.description: Skill name for skill_handoff stages. Supports string, null, or language map.

script_module.description: Python module name for script/hybrid stages

followup_skill.description: Skill to handoff to if script check fails (hybrid stages only)

input_artifacts.description: Input file paths relative to project root. Prefix with 'optional:' for non-blocking inputs.

output_artifacts.description: Expected output file paths relative to project root

preconditions.description: Conditions that must be met before stage starts

done_conditions.description: Conditions for stage completion (used by script, manual, hybrid stages)

handoff_done.description: Conditions for handoff generation completion (skill_handoff stages only). Stage enters waiting_for_user when these are met.

stage_done.description: Conditions for actual stage completion after user/skill execution (skill_handoff stages only). Checked by 'confirm' command.

quality_checks.description: Quality verification items to run after stage completion

user_confirmation_required.description: Whether user must run 'confirm' before stage can be marked done

handoff_prompt_template.description: Template string for skill_handoff prompt. Variables in {curly_braces} are substituted at render time.

fallback_on_failure.description: What to do when execution fails

not_in_v0.2_mvp.description: Stage excluded from v0.2 MVP (treated as manual/future)
